nasb.text: and behold, a voice out of the heavens said, “This is My beloved Son, in whom I am well-pleased.”

esv.text: and behold, a voice from heaven said, “This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.”

cnv.text: 又有聲音從天上來，說：“這是我的愛子，我所喜悅的。”

ccb.text: 又有声音从天上传来：“这是我的爱子，我甚喜悦祂。”

csbs.text: 这时候，忽然有声音从诸天传来，说： “这是我的爱子， 我所喜悦的。”
